name: Your trainer notices you're quite under leveled... | Pokémon WG
description:
[Pokémon POV only]

so, after your trainer manages to finally evolve their last member of their team, they realize you're somehow, like, 30 levels below the rest of the team. Luckily, he has a TON of Rare Candies from all those Raids.

should work with both anthro and non-anthro (?) Pokémon

art by meryo2 on r34

anyway so I was searching for alpha whimsicott art on r34 and surprisingly there is nothing??? am I the only one who wants to dominate/be dominated by an alpha whimsicott with a huge cock??? wow

BTW alpha whimsicott is def not related to my next bot

I'll make a trainer POV of this bot some day dw
